name: file-manager
description: Cross-platform ranger-inspired file manager with native drag-out

scripts.build: npm run build:native && tsc -b && vite build

extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Breeze File needs access to your Documents folder to browse and manage files.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Breeze File needs access to your Downloads folder to browse and manage files.
extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Breeze File needs access to your Desktop folder to browse and manage files.
extendInfo.NSRemovableVolumesUsageDescription: Breeze File needs access to removable volumes (USB drives, SD cards) to browse and manage files.
extendInfo.NSNetworkVolumesUsageDescription: Breeze File needs access to network volumes to browse and manage files.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Breeze File uses Apple Events to open files in other applications and reveal them in Finder.
extendInfo.NSSystemAdministrationUsageDescription: Breeze File needs access to system folders to browse and manage files.
